description_long: This is a two-story hardware store with a flat roof and a modern, boxy design. The building features a cream-colored facade accented with orange trim along the edges, roofline, and around the windows and doors. The front of the store has two large rectangular windows on the upper floor and a striped orange-and-white awning above the main entrance, which is a glass door with a side panel. The windows are outlined in orange and have a blue tint, suggesting reflective or tinted glass. The roof has two small, square rooftop units, likely for ventilation or HVAC, and the overall structure is clean and geometric. No signage or visible hardware items are displayed on the exterior, and the design is simple yet functional, suitable for an urban commercial district.
description: A modern, two-story hardware store with orange trim, blue-tinted windows, and a striped awning above the glass entrance. The facade is clean and geometric, with no visible signage or exterior displays.
description_view_0: The rear and side of the building, showing the flat roof with two small rooftop units and orange trim, but no windows or doors.
description_view_1: A side view highlighting the orange trim and the flat, featureless wall, with a partial glimpse of the rooftop units.
description_view_2: The front of the hardware store, featuring two large windows, a striped awning, and the main glass entrance door, all accented with orange trim.
description_view_3: A front corner view showing both the entrance side and the adjacent wall, with clear visibility of the windows, awning, and architectural details.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features a glass entrance door with a striped awning above it, flanked by two large rectangular windows on the upper floor. The facade is accented with orange trim and has a clean, modern appearance with no exterior displays.
